narrative:
Waterloo Township has 1,413 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.2 percentage points.
